ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the station */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" TEXT /* Elevation of the station above sea level */,
  "drainage_area" TEXT /* Drainage area of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hydrological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was collected */,
  "gs_et" REAL /* Monthly reference evapotranspiration (ET) */,
  "gs_etof" REAL /* Monthly ET as a percentage of the reference */,
  "gs_eto" REAL /* Monthly ET with adjustments */,
  "ann_et" REAL /* Annual ET */,
  "ann_etof" REAL /* Annual ET as a percentage of the reference */,
  "ann_eto" REAL /* Annual ET with adjustments */,
  "discharge_mean_cfs" REAL /* Average discharge rate in cubic feet per second */,
  "discharge_max_cfs" REAL /* Maximum discharge rate in cubic feet per second */,
  "discharge_min_cfs" REAL /* Minimum discharge rate in cubic feet per second */,
  "water_temperature" TEXT /* Water temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "water_quality" TEXT /* Water quality index (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hydrological_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annual_data" (
  "annual_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annual data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "ann_et" REAL /* Annual ET */,
  "ann_etof" REAL /* Annual ET as a percentage of the reference */,
  "ann_eto" REAL /* Annual ET with adjustments */,
  "avg_water_temperature" TEXT /* Average water temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "avg_water_quality" TEXT /* Average water quality index (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annual_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_data" (
  "monthly_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monthly data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the data was collected */,
  "year_month" TEXT /* Year and month the data was collected */,
  "gs_et" REAL /* Monthly reference ET */,
  "gs_etof" REAL /* Monthly ET as a percentage of the reference */,
  "gs_eto" REAL /* Monthly ET with adjustments */,
  "avg_discharge" REAL /* Average discharge rate in cubic feet per second */,
  "max_discharge" REAL /* Maximum discharge rate in cubic feet per second */,
  "min_discharge" REAL /* Minimum discharge rate in cubic feet per second */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monthly_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discharge_data" (
  "discharge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discharge data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "discharge_mean_cfs" REAL /* Average discharge rate in cubic feet per second */,
  "max_discharge_cfs" REAL /* Maximum discharge rate in cubic feet per second */,
  "min_discharge_cfs" REAL /* Minimum discharge rate in cubic feet per second */,
  "peak_flow_cfs" REAL /* Peak flow rate in cubic feet per second */,
  "peak_flow_date" TEXT /* Date of peak flow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discharge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discharge_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality" (
  "water_quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water quality data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was collected */,
  "ph" TEXT /* pH level */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Water temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "turbidity" TEXT /* Turbidity in NTU */,
  "dissolved_oxygen" TEXT /* Dissolved oxygen in mg/L */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("water_quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, hydrologist, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_downloaded" INTEGER /* Indicates whether data was downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station the report is about */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the report covers */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual summary, trend analysis) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the event occurred */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was issued */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., flood warning, drought alert) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert and the event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station the prediction is for */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of predictive model used */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value based on the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model parameter */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of predictive model */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)
